name: Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry meat in the marinade until it is almost done.
2. Add bell peppers and onion, cut into strips and rings.
3. Cook until tender crisp.
4. Just before serving, add tomato chunks.
5. Serve on flour tortillas with refried beans, rice, grated Cheddar cheese, sour cream, jalapeno, hot sauce, shredded lettuce or anything else you prefer.
6. HINT: Make ahead of time, wrap in Handi-Wrap, place in lunch box, and heat before eating.
